Two powerful TradingView indicators

Built for long-term accumulation and for people who want fewer moving parts, optimized and tested weekly decisions, and stronger long-term BTC reserves.

BTC Operating System

A maintained BTC operating system with clear weekly guidance, suggested sizing, optional Trim logic, and proof on chart — built to help you stack more sats with less cash over time.

XRP Top/Bottom Indicator

A disciplined weekly XRP cycle system with a fault-tolerant design, top-side defense, a dynamic Weekly Plan, and transparent on-chart proof tracking.

Use BTC as the base system. Add XRP only when it strengthens your broader plan.

Which tool fits your plan right now?

Start with BTC. Long-term disciplined BTC accumulation should always be the goal. Add XRP when you want the cycle amplifier. Use both when you want the full system.

Start with BTC

The clearest starting point for most people.

Start with the BTC Operating System when the real goal is more Bitcoin. It turns weekly BTC buying into one clear decision, one suggested amount, optional Trim logic, and proof on chart. Easy to start using. Strong enough to rely on well into the future.

  • Clear weekly BTC guidance and suggested sizing
  • Optional Trim features plus different modes for different styles
  • Proof on chart versus a matched auto-buy baseline
Explore BTCPricing
Add XRP

A disciplined weekly cycle system.

Add the XRP Top/Bottom Indicator when you want a disciplined system for building, managing, and defending exposure around the bigger XRP turns. It combines MAJOR / RADAR structure, top-side defense, a dynamic Weekly Plan, and on-chart proof tracking so you can stay structured with less improvisation.

  • MAJOR, RADAR, LIGHT, EARLY, and top-side risk structure
  • Weekly Plan dashboard with a dynamic weekly budget path
  • Built around confirmed weekly structure, not constant intraday watching
Explore XRPPricing
Use both

Use both for the full AZRO system.

Keep BTC at the center while using XRP as the cycle amplifier inside a disciplined plan.

  • Weekly BTC accumulation plus a structured XRP cycle workflow
  • A clear plan for turning XRP wins into more BTC or future XRP reloads
  • Both tools inside TradingView on free plans

XRP Top/Bottom Indicator.

Built, tested, and maintained to help you capture major cycle moves with a fault-tolerant weekly workflow, a dynamic Weekly Plan, and transparent on-chart proof tracking.

Capture major cycle moves.

AZRO is a disciplined weekly XRP cycle system with a fault-tolerant design, a dynamic Weekly Plan, and transparent on-chart proof tracking built to help users stay structured, adaptable, and risk-aware across the full cycle.

Cycle intelligence

See the full cycle more clearly.

MAJOR, RADAR, LIGHT, EARLY, and risk context compress the cycle into one usable weekly workflow.

Weekly Plan + proof

Build, manage, and defend exposure with a plan.

The Weekly Plan dashboard adds disciplined weekly budget guidance and keeps on-chart proof tracking visible between major turns.

Fault-tolerant design

Stay usable as conditions change.

Layered confirmations, top-side defense, and maintained defaults help the workflow stay dependable across changing market conditions.
